description: Some way to write and run tests in fz itself. assert, group, run; probably cribbed from ExUnit's shape.

comments.text: Depends on fz-ul4.10 (macros). The ExUnit shape — `test "name" do ... end` — is fundamentally a macro that expands to a fn def + registration call. Doing this without macros means hacking a new top-level item into the parser; doing it after macros makes `test` a defmacro that fits the language naturally.

title: Test runner
